scenes.text:
Your story is the most powerful tool
you have. Stop keeping it to yourself.

Every person on this planet has a unique story. And somewhere out there, someone is going through exactly what you went through. Your story could be the
light that guides them out of darkness. Your failures, your lessons, your triumphs. They are not just your story. They are someone else is survival guide.

Do not wait until you are successful to share. Share from the
middle. Share the messy parts. Authenticity resonates more than perfection ever will.

Your mess is your message.
Your test is your testimony.

Share a piece of your story below. You never know
who needs to hear it. Follow for real stories.
